worthSeeing.title: Brimstone Hill Fortress:
worthSeeing.text: A UNESCO fortress built by slave labour to defend British sugar interests.

worthSeeing.title: Nevis Peak Hike:
worthSeeing.text: A cloud forest trail to the summit of a dormant volcanic cone.

worthSeeing.title: Pinney's Beach:
worthSeeing.text: A long palm-lined beach on the sheltered Caribbean side of Nevis.
